eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gate Enforcement
eval_dimensions.description: Each preference choice (preset, overlays, per-gate deviations, skippable steps) is presented via AskUserQuestion, never plain text

eval_dimensions.name: Write Only On Completion
eval_dimensions.description: Persists preferences only after a genuine choice completes the walk; dismissing a required gate aborts with no write

eval_dimensions.name: Gate Axis Persistence
eval_dimensions.description: Writes preset/overlays/gate-overrides to the global friction.yaml via dev10x session set-friction (never a bare Write)

eval_dimensions.name: Playbook Axis Persistence
eval_dimensions.description: Writes active_modes / per-step skips to the global playbook via dev10x session set-playbook

eval_dimensions.name: Deviations Only
eval_dimensions.description: Records only gates that deviate from the chosen preset in gate_overrides

eval_dimensions.name: Self-tracking
eval_dimensions.description: Creates a tracking task at invocation and completes it after persistence

evals.name: Configure a project with the guided preset and no deviations
evals.description: Supervisor picks guided, no overlays, keeps preset gate defaults, skips no steps. Skill writes only gate_preset via set-friction.

assertions.signal: Preset choice presented via AskUserQuestion, not plain text
Overlays, per-gate-deviation, and skippable-step gates are each AskUserQuestion calls
No --gate-override flags passed when the supervisor kept preset defaults
set-playbook is NOT called when no overlays and no skipped steps were selected
Tracking task marked completed after the write returns

evals.name: Configure adaptive + solo-maintainer overlay and skip Draft Job Story
evals.description: Supervisor picks adaptive, solo-maintainer overlay, one gate deviation (merge=ask), and skips the JTBD step. Both axes are written.

assertions.signal: set-friction carries preset, overlay, and the one deviating gate
Only merge=ask is passed as a gate override — unchanged gates are omitted
set-playbook run with --skip-step 'Draft Job Story' (and --mode for structural overlays)

evals.name: Dismissing the preset gate aborts with no write
evals.description: Supervisor dismisses the required preset AskUserQuestion. Skill writes nothing and leaves the project unconfigured so the nudge fires again next session.

setup.note: Supervisor cancels the first required AskUserQuestion

assertions.signal: dev10x session set-friction is NOT run when the walk is dismissed
dev10x session set-playbook is NOT run when the walk is dismissed
Skill reports it aborted without writing; project stays unconfigured
Tracking task left pending (not deleted) when the walk is dismissed

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should / should-not trigger Dev10x:friction-setup

should_trigger.query: this project isn't configured for friction — set it up
should_trigger.rationale: Responding to the SessionStart unconfigured nudge — core use case

should_trigger.query: configure the autonomy posture for this repo

should_not_trigger.query: walk away, no more questions this session
set up Dev10x in this brand-new project

should_not_trigger.rationale: Explaining resolver behavior, not changing preferences
